title: Veggie Tales Drag Cabaret
description: A playful drag cabaret where vegetables meet performance art. Creative costumes, hilarious routines, and a unique atmosphere perfect for couples who appreciate quirky entertainment. Great energy and very date-night friendly.

title: Open Mic Night
description: Atlanta's premier open mic comedy night. New talent mixed with seasoned performers. Casual, fun atmosphere with drinks — ideal for couples who love to laugh together. Must be 21+.

title: 808 Laughs: Summer Fun
description: 808 Laughs brings summer vibes and solid comedy to ATL. A great way to kick off date night with good laughs in a relaxed setting.

title: Afro Beat & Caribbean Vibes
description: Feel the heat with tropical vibes and the best of Afrobeat and Caribbean music. Perfect for couples who love to dance and groove together. Great energy, good crowd, and awesome music — ideal date night material.

title: The Reminisce ATL
description: Timeless sounds, immersive vibes, and a curated crowd. This event brings a sophisticated yet relaxed atmosphere with great African-inspired food and drinks. Perfect for couples who appreciate good music and good eats.

title: Hot Mess: A Dance Pop Party
description: Atlanta's dance pop party at the iconic 404.EXE (former MJQ location). High energy, great DJs, and a crowd that's there to have a good time. Late-night dancing for couples who want to let loose and have fun.

title: Marcia Wood Gallery Openings: Susan Ker-Seymer & George Long
description: Dual opening reception featuring Susan Ker-Seymer and George Long. Wine, art, and good company in one of Atlanta's best contemporary galleries. Sophisticated and free — perfect low-key date idea for art-loving couples.

title: Lines of Play Opening Reception
description: Group exhibition celebrating the World Cup with over 30 local artists. Art, drinks, and great vibes. A cultured and relaxed atmosphere — great for couples who like sports and art together.

title: Where Being Takes Root: Opening Reception
location: GSU Welch School Galleries, Atlanta, GA
description: Opening reception featuring thought-provoking contemporary art. Free admission in a university gallery setting. Quiet, intellectual atmosphere — great for couples who enjoy meaningful conversations over art.

title: Rosebud Baker at The Punchline
location: The Punchline Comedy Club, Atlanta, GA
description: Rosebud Baker brings her sharp, observational comedy to Atlanta's legendary Punchline Comedy Club. One of the best date night activities — laughs, drinks, and a memorable evening out.

title: Art of the Game Open Reception
description: Opening reception at Gallery Chimera exploring art through the lens of games. Creative, playful, and engaging — a unique date experience for couples who want something different from the typical.

title: Artful ATL
description: A premier event creating space and community for emerging artists, collectors, and art enthusiasts. Great music, great art, and a stylish crowd. Perfect for couples who appreciate creativity and culture.
